translations: and the Last and the Apparent
puzzle.hint: This verse describes four of Allah's most profound attributes: His pre-existence, eternity, manifestness, and hiddenness.
puzzle.arabic: هُوَ ٱلْأَوَّلُ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرُ وَٱلظَّـٰهِرُ وَٱلْبَاطِنُ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
puzzle.verseEn: He is the First and the Last, the Ascendant and the Intimate, and He is, of all things, Knowing.
